hooks.template: They said, "(insert famous cliché or quote)" — that's a lie.
hooks.text: They said your supplier wants US dollars. That's a lie. They want CNY.

hooks.template: Everyone tells you to (insert action) but nobody actually tells you how to do it. Here is a #-second step-by-step tutorial that you can save.
hooks.text: Everyone says pay your supplier, nobody says pay in CNY. Here's why it's cheaper.

hooks.template: My customer/client got (insert dream result) without (insert pain point).
hooks.text: This business owner cut his supplier quote 3 percent without changing the order.

hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: A buyer asked his factory for the CNY price and noticed something strange. It dropped.

hooks.template: What (insert title) says vs what they mean.
hooks.text: What your supplier says: pay in US dollars. What they mean: please pay CNY.
